pi_items.source: setup_libreoffice_base.sh confirms this path in line 65: cp /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb /home/ga/chinook.odb
Task description and verifier.py line 31 confirm this form name is the expected output

Chinook database schema (verified via web search and create_chinook_odb.py) contains a Customer table. Web search confirms: Customer table has columns CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Company, Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, Email, SupportRepId (13 columns total)
Task description specifies form property 'Allow additions' must be set to 'No'. Verifier.py line 161 checks for form:allow-inserts='false'
Task description specifies form property 'Allow modifications' must be set to 'No'. Verifier.py line 161 checks for form:allow-updates='false'
Task description specifies form property 'Allow deletions' must be set to 'No'. Verifier.py line 161 checks for form:allow-deletes='false'

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database sourced from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The database is installed at /home/ga/chinook.odb and contains a Customer table with 13 columns (CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Company, Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, Email, SupportRepId). The task requires creating a form named 'Customer_ReadOnly' bound to the Customer table with three security properties set to false (allow-inserts, allow-updates, allow-deletes) to prevent any data modifications.
